parameters.command:
=LOG="/tmp/claude-run-{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.issueId }}.jsonl"
OFFSET_FILE="${LOG}.offset"
PIDFILE="/tmp/claude-pid-{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.issueId }}"
# Read PID from file each iteration (inject may change it)
if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  PID=$(cat "$PIDFILE" | tr -d '\n')
else
  PID={{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.pid }}
fi
OFFSET=$(cat "$OFFSET_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
TOTAL=$(wc -l < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
NEW_LINES=""
if [ "$TOTAL" -gt "$OFFSET" ]; then
  NEW_LINES=$(tail -n +$((OFFSET + 1)) "$LOG" | head -n 200)
  echo "$TOTAL" > "$OFFSET_FILE"
fi
if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
  ALIVE=true
elif [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  # PID dead but PID file exists — inject may be restarting Claude
  ALIVE=grace
else
  ALIVE=false
fi
echo "ALIVE:$ALIVE"
echo "OFFSET:$TOTAL"
echo "LINES_START"
echo "$NEW_LINES"
echo "LINES_END"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: $('Format Progress').first().json.body, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: $('Format Progress').first().json.htmlBody }) }}
